name: ReadyInSeconds
description:
Time in seconds when the order will be ready.

This value incorporates the order `preparationTimeInSeconds` plus the 
value of `fireOrderInSeconds`. When `fireOrderInSeconds=0`, then `readyInSeconds`
will match the value of `preparationTimeInSeconds`, and when 
`fireOrderInSeconds=null`, then `readyInSeconds=null` as well.
